description: Rigol DG1000Z series dual-channel function/arbitrary waveform generator (DG1022Z/DG1032Z/DG1062Z). Controlled by SCPI commands over USB, LAN or GPIB. Parameter ranges shown are based on the DG1062Z.

commands.name: idn
commands.description: Query the instrument identification string (manufacturer, model, serial number, firmware version).

commands.name: reset
commands.description: Restore the instrument to its factory default state.

commands.name: clear_status
commands.description: Clear all event registers and the error queue.

commands.name: event_status_enable
commands.description: Set or query the enable register for the standard event status register.

commands.name: event_status_register
commands.description: Query and clear the standard event status register.

commands.name: operation_complete
commands.description: Set bit 0 of the standard event status register when the current operation finishes; the query returns 1 when complete.

commands.name: option_query
commands.description: Query the options currently installed in the instrument.

commands.name: power_on_status_clear
commands.description: Set or query whether the ESE and SRE registers are cleared at power-on.

commands.name: recall_state
commands.description: Recall the instrument state previously stored in the specified storage location.

commands.name: save_state
commands.description: Save the current instrument state to the specified storage location.

commands.name: service_request_enable
commands.description: Set or query the enable register for the status byte register.

commands.name: status_byte
commands.description: Query the status byte register.

commands.name: trigger
commands.description: Generate a trigger event.

commands.name: wait
commands.description: Wait for all pending operations to complete before executing further commands.

commands.name: apply_query
commands.description: Query the waveform type, frequency, amplitude, offset and phase of the specified channel.

commands.name: apply_sine
commands.description: Output a sine waveform with the specified frequency, amplitude, offset and phase.

commands.name: apply_square
commands.description: Output a square waveform with the specified frequency, amplitude, offset and phase.

commands.name: apply_ramp
commands.description: Output a ramp waveform with the specified frequency, amplitude, offset and phase.

commands.name: apply_pulse
commands.description: Output a pulse waveform with the specified frequency, amplitude, offset and phase.

commands.name: apply_noise
commands.description: Output noise with the specified amplitude and offset.

commands.name: apply_dc
commands.description: Output a DC level with the specified offset. Frequency and amplitude are placeholders only.

commands.name: apply_user
commands.description: Set the channel to arbitrary waveform (frequency output mode) with the specified frequency, amplitude, offset and phase. Use FUNCtion:SHAPe to choose the actual arbitrary waveform.

commands.name: apply_arbitrary
commands.description: Set the channel to arbitrary waveform (sample-rate output mode) with the specified sample rate, amplitude and offset. Use FUNCtion:SHAPe to choose the actual arbitrary waveform.

commands.name: apply_harmonic
commands.description: Enable the harmonic function and set the fundamental (sine) frequency, amplitude, offset and phase.

commands.name: apply_triangle
commands.description: Output a triangle waveform (ramp with 100% symmetry) with the specified frequency, amplitude, offset and phase.

commands.name: function_shape
commands.description: Set or query the waveform type of the channel. Accepts basic, harmonic and named arbitrary waveforms.

commands.name: function_ramp_symmetry
commands.description: Set or query the symmetry of the ramp waveform.

commands.name: function_square_dcycle
commands.description: Set or query the duty cycle of the square waveform.

commands.name: function_square_period
commands.description: Set or query the period of the square waveform.

commands.name: function_arbitrary_mode
commands.description: Set or query the arbitrary waveform output mode (frequency or sample rate).

commands.name: function_arbitrary_srate
commands.description: Set or query the sample rate of the arbitrary waveform in sample-rate output mode.

commands.name: function_pulse_dcycle
commands.description: Set or query the pulse duty cycle.

commands.name: function_pulse_hold
commands.description: Set or query whether pulse width or duty cycle is held constant when the period changes.

commands.name: function_pulse_period
commands.description: Set or query the pulse period.

commands.name: function_pulse_width
commands.description: Set or query the pulse width.

commands.name: function_pulse_transition_both
commands.description: Set or query both the leading and trailing edge transition time of the pulse waveform.

commands.name: function_pulse_transition_leading
commands.description: Set or query the leading edge transition time of the pulse waveform.

commands.name: function_pulse_transition_trailing
commands.description: Set or query the trailing edge transition time of the pulse waveform.

commands.name: frequency
commands.description: Set or query the output frequency of the channel.

commands.name: frequency_center
commands.description: Set or query the center frequency in sweep mode.

commands.name: frequency_span
commands.description: Set or query the frequency span in sweep mode.

commands.name: frequency_start
commands.description: Set or query the start frequency in sweep mode.

commands.name: frequency_stop
commands.description: Set or query the stop frequency in sweep mode.

commands.name: frequency_couple_mode
commands.description: Set or query the frequency coupling mode (offset or ratio).

commands.name: frequency_couple_offset
commands.description: Set or query the frequency coupling offset.

commands.name: frequency_couple_ratio
commands.description: Set or query the frequency coupling ratio.

commands.name: frequency_couple_state
commands.description: Enable or disable, or query, the frequency coupling function.

commands.name: period
commands.description: Set or query the output period of the channel.

commands.name: voltage_amplitude
commands.description: Set or query the output amplitude of the channel. Minimum 2mVpp; maximum limited by impedance and frequency.

commands.name: voltage_high
commands.description: Set or query the high level value of the waveform.

commands.name: voltage_low
commands.description: Set or query the low level value of the waveform.

commands.name: voltage_offset
commands.description: Set or query the DC offset voltage of the waveform.

commands.name: voltage_unit
commands.description: Set or query the amplitude unit of the channel.

commands.name: voltage_range_auto
commands.description: Enable or disable, or query, the auto range function.

commands.name: voltage_couple_state
commands.description: Enable or disable, or query, the amplitude coupling function.

commands.name: phase
commands.description: Set or query the start phase of the channel.

commands.name: phase_initiate
commands.description: Execute an align-phase operation on the channel.

commands.name: phase_synchronize
commands.description: Align the phases of the two channels.

commands.name: am_depth
commands.description: Set or query the modulation depth of AM.

commands.name: am_dssc
commands.description: Enable or disable, or query, double-sideband suppressed carrier AM.

commands.name: am_internal_frequency
commands.description: Set or query the AM internal modulation frequency.

commands.name: am_internal_function
commands.description: Set or query the AM internal modulating waveform.

commands.name: am_source
commands.description: Set or query the AM modulation source (internal or external).

commands.name: am_state
commands.description: Enable or disable, or query, AM modulation.

commands.name: fm_deviation
commands.description: Set or query the FM frequency deviation.

commands.name: fm_internal_frequency
commands.description: Set or query the FM internal modulation frequency.

commands.name: fm_internal_function
commands.description: Set or query the FM internal modulating waveform.

commands.name: fm_source
commands.description: Set or query the FM modulation source (internal or external).

commands.name: fm_state
commands.description: Enable or disable, or query, FM modulation.

commands.name: pm_deviation
commands.description: Set or query the PM phase deviation.

commands.name: pm_internal_frequency
commands.description: Set or query the PM internal modulation frequency.

commands.name: pm_internal_function
commands.description: Set or query the PM internal modulating waveform.

commands.name: pm_source
commands.description: Set or query the PM modulation source (internal or external).

commands.name: pm_state
commands.description: Enable or disable, or query, PM modulation.

commands.name: ask_amplitude
commands.description: Set or query the ASK modulation amplitude.

commands.name: ask_internal_rate
commands.description: Set or query the ASK internal modulation rate.

commands.name: ask_polarity
commands.description: Set or query the ASK modulation polarity.

commands.name: ask_source
commands.description: Set or query the ASK modulation source (internal or external).

commands.name: ask_state
commands.description: Enable or disable, or query, ASK modulation.

commands.name: fsk_frequency
commands.description: Set or query the FSK hop frequency.

commands.name: fsk_internal_rate
commands.description: Set or query the FSK internal modulation rate.

commands.name: fsk_polarity
commands.description: Set or query the FSK modulation polarity.

commands.name: fsk_source
commands.description: Set or query the FSK modulation source (internal or external).

commands.name: fsk_state
commands.description: Enable or disable, or query, FSK modulation.

commands.name: psk_internal_rate
commands.description: Set or query the PSK internal modulation rate.

commands.name: psk_phase
commands.description: Set or query the PSK phase.

commands.name: psk_polarity
commands.description: Set or query the PSK modulation polarity.

commands.name: psk_source
commands.description: Set or query the PSK modulation source (internal or external).

commands.name: psk_state
commands.description: Enable or disable, or query, PSK modulation.

commands.name: pwm_deviation_dcycle
commands.description: Set or query the PWM duty cycle deviation.

commands.name: pwm_deviation_width
commands.description: Set or query the PWM pulse width deviation.

commands.name: pwm_internal_frequency
commands.description: Set or query the PWM internal modulation frequency.

commands.name: pwm_internal_function
commands.description: Set or query the PWM internal modulating waveform.

commands.name: pwm_source
commands.description: Set or query the PWM modulation source (internal or external).

commands.name: pwm_state
commands.description: Enable or disable, or query, PWM modulation.

commands.name: mod_state
commands.description: Enable or disable, or query, the modulation function.

commands.name: mod_type
commands.description: Set or query the modulation type.

commands.name: sum_amplitude
commands.description: Set or query the waveform sum amplitude (ratio of the sum waveform).

commands.name: sum_internal_frequency
commands.description: Set or query the frequency of the sum waveform.

commands.name: sum_internal_function
commands.description: Set or query the sum waveform type.

commands.name: sum_state
commands.description: Enable or disable, or query, the waveform sum function.

commands.name: burst_state
commands.description: Enable or disable, or query, the burst function.

commands.name: burst_mode
commands.description: Set or query the burst mode.

commands.name: burst_ncycles
commands.description: Set or query the number of cycles in N-cycle burst mode.

commands.name: burst_internal_period
commands.description: Set or query the burst period in N-cycle/internal-triggered mode.

commands.name: burst_phase
commands.description: Set or query the burst start phase.

commands.name: burst_tdelay
commands.description: Set or query the burst delay (time between trigger and start of burst).

commands.name: burst_gate_polarity
commands.description: Set or query the gate polarity in gated burst mode.

commands.name: burst_trigger_immediate
commands.description: Trigger a burst immediately (manual trigger).

commands.name: burst_trigger_slope
commands.description: Set or query the edge of the external trigger for burst.

commands.name: burst_trigger_source
commands.description: Set or query the trigger source for burst.

commands.name: burst_trigger_trigout
commands.description: Set or query the edge of the trigger output signal for burst.

commands.name: sweep_state
commands.description: Enable or disable, or query, the sweep function.

commands.name: sweep_spacing
commands.description: Set or query the sweep type (linear, logarithmic or step).

commands.name: sweep_time
commands.description: Set or query the sweep time.

commands.name: sweep_rtime
commands.description: Set or query the sweep return time.

commands.name: sweep_htime_start
commands.description: Set or query the start hold time of the sweep.

commands.name: sweep_htime_stop
commands.description: Set or query the stop hold time of the sweep.

commands.name: sweep_step
commands.description: Set or query the number of steps in step sweep mode.

commands.name: sweep_trigger_immediate
commands.description: Trigger a sweep immediately (manual trigger).

commands.name: sweep_trigger_slope
commands.description: Set or query the edge of the external trigger for sweep.

commands.name: sweep_trigger_source
commands.description: Set or query the trigger source for sweep.

commands.name: sweep_trigger_trigout
commands.description: Set or query the edge of the trigger output signal for sweep.

commands.name: harmonic_state
commands.description: Enable or disable, or query, the harmonic function.

commands.name: harmonic_type
commands.description: Set or query the harmonic type.

commands.name: harmonic_order
commands.description: Set or query the highest harmonic order.

commands.name: harmonic_amplitude
commands.description: Set or query the amplitude of the specified harmonic.

commands.name: harmonic_phase
commands.description: Set or query the phase of the specified harmonic.

commands.name: harmonic_user
commands.description: Set or query which harmonics (2nd to 8th) are output in user-defined harmonic mode.

commands.name: marker_frequency
commands.description: Set or query the sweep marker frequency.

commands.name: marker_state
commands.description: Enable or disable, or query, the sweep marker function.

commands.name: pulse_dcycle
commands.description: Set or query the pulse duty cycle.

commands.name: pulse_hold
commands.description: Set or query whether pulse width or duty cycle is held constant.

commands.name: pulse_width
commands.description: Set or query the pulse width.

commands.name: pulse_transition_leading
commands.description: Set or query the leading edge transition time of the pulse.

commands.name: pulse_transition_trailing
commands.description: Set or query the trailing edge transition time of the pulse.

commands.name: track
commands.description: Set or query the track function between the two channels.

commands.name: trace_data_catalog
commands.description: Query the names of the arbitrary waveforms stored in volatile memory.

commands.name: trace_data_copy
commands.description: Copy the named arbitrary waveform to volatile memory.

commands.name: trace_data
commands.description: Download arbitrary waveform float point data to volatile memory.

commands.name: trace_data_dac
commands.description: Download arbitrary waveform DAC data (14-bit) to volatile memory.

commands.name: trace_data_dac16
commands.description: Download arbitrary waveform 16-bit DAC binary data to volatile memory.

commands.name: trace_data_value
commands.description: Set or query the DAC value of a specified point in volatile memory.

commands.name: trace_data_points
commands.description: Set or query the number of initialized points of the arbitrary waveform in volatile memory.

commands.name: trace_data_load
commands.description: Query the arbitrary waveform data in volatile memory.

commands.name: trace_data_lock
commands.description: Lock or unlock, or query, a stored arbitrary waveform.

commands.name: trace_data_delete
commands.description: Delete the specified stored arbitrary waveform.

commands.name: output_state
commands.description: Enable or disable, or query, the channel output.

commands.name: output_impedance
commands.description: Set or query the output impedance of the channel.

commands.name: output_load
commands.description: Set or query the output load of the channel.

commands.name: output_mode
commands.description: Set or query the output mode (normal or gated) of the channel.

commands.name: output_polarity
commands.description: Set or query the output polarity of the channel.

commands.name: output_gate_polarity
commands.description: Set or query the gate polarity in gated output mode.

commands.name: output_sync_state
commands.description: Enable or disable, or query, the sync output of the channel.

commands.name: output_sync_polarity
commands.description: Set or query the polarity of the sync output signal.

commands.name: output_sync_delay
commands.description: Set or query the delay of the sync output signal.

commands.name: counter_state
commands.description: Set or query the status of the frequency counter (on/off/run/stop/single).

commands.name: counter_auto
commands.description: Let the instrument select a proper gate time automatically for the frequency counter.

commands.name: counter_coupling
commands.description: Set or query the coupling mode (AC or DC) of the frequency counter input.

commands.name: counter_gatetime
commands.description: Set or query the gate time of the frequency counter (USER1 to USER6).

commands.name: counter_hf
commands.description: Enable or disable, or query, the high-frequency rejection of the frequency counter.

commands.name: counter_level
commands.description: Set or query the trigger level of the frequency counter.

commands.name: counter_sensitive
commands.description: Set or query the trigger sensitivity of the frequency counter.

commands.name: counter_measure
commands.description: Query the frequency counter measurement results (frequency, period, duty cycle, positive and negative pulse width).

commands.name: counter_statistics_state
commands.description: Enable or disable, or query, the statistics function of the frequency counter.

commands.name: counter_statistics_display
commands.description: Set or query the display format (digital or curve) of the frequency counter statistics.

commands.name: counter_statistics_clear
commands.description: Clear the frequency counter statistic results.

commands.name: coupling_state
commands.description: Enable or disable, or query, the channel coupling function.

commands.name: coupling_freq_state
commands.description: Enable or disable, or query, frequency coupling.

commands.name: coupling_freq_mode
commands.description: Set or query the frequency coupling mode (offset or ratio).

commands.name: coupling_freq_deviation
commands.description: Set or query the frequency coupling deviation (offset mode).

commands.name: coupling_freq_ratio
commands.description: Set or query the frequency coupling ratio (ratio mode).

commands.name: coupling_ampl_state
commands.description: Enable or disable, or query, amplitude coupling.

commands.name: coupling_ampl_mode
commands.description: Set or query the amplitude coupling mode (offset or ratio).

commands.name: coupling_ampl_deviation
commands.description: Set or query the amplitude coupling deviation (offset mode).

commands.name: coupling_ampl_ratio
commands.description: Set or query the amplitude coupling ratio (ratio mode).

commands.name: coupling_phase_state
commands.description: Enable or disable, or query, phase coupling.

commands.name: coupling_phase_mode
commands.description: Set or query the phase coupling mode (offset or ratio).

commands.name: coupling_phase_deviation
commands.description: Set or query the phase coupling deviation (offset mode).

commands.name: coupling_phase_ratio
commands.description: Set or query the phase coupling ratio (ratio mode).

commands.name: display_brightness
commands.description: Set or query the screen brightness.

commands.name: display_contrast
commands.description: Set or query the screen contrast.

commands.name: display_data
commands.description: Read the screen image data (bitmap).

commands.name: display_mode
commands.description: Set or query the display mode (dual parameter view, dual graph view, single view).

commands.name: display_saver_state
commands.description: Enable or disable, or query, the screen saver.

commands.name: display_saver_immediate
commands.description: Enter the screen saver state immediately.

commands.name: display_state
commands.description: Turn the display on or off, or query its status.

commands.name: display_text
commands.description: Display a text string on the screen, or query the displayed text.

commands.name: display_text_clear
commands.description: Clear the text displayed on the screen.

commands.name: hcopy_data
commands.description: Read the screen dump image data.

commands.name: hcopy_data_format
commands.description: Set or query the format of the screen dump image data.

commands.name: license_install
commands.description: Install an option license (serial number / key).

commands.name: lxi_identify
commands.description: Enable or disable, or query, the LXI identify indicator.

commands.name: lxi_mdns_enable
commands.description: Enable or disable, or query, the mDNS function.

commands.name: lxi_mdns_hostname
commands.description: Query the mDNS host name.

commands.name: lxi_mdns_sname_desired
commands.description: Set or query the desired mDNS service name.

commands.name: lxi_mdns_sname_resolved
commands.description: Query the resolved mDNS service name.

commands.name: lxi_reset
commands.description: Reset the LAN settings to their default values.

commands.name: lxi_restart
commands.description: Restart the network with the current LAN settings.

commands.name: memory_nstates
commands.description: Query the number of state storage locations.

commands.name: memory_state_catalog
commands.description: Query the names of the stored states.

commands.name: memory_state_delete
commands.description: Delete a stored state.

commands.name: memory_state_lock
commands.description: Lock or unlock, or query, a state storage location.

commands.name: memory_state_name
commands.description: Set or query the name of a state storage location.

commands.name: memory_state_recall_auto
commands.description: Enable or disable, or query, automatic recall of the last state at power-on.

commands.name: memory_state_valid
commands.description: Query whether a state storage location contains valid data.

commands.name: mmemory_catalog_all
commands.description: Query all files and folders in the specified directory.

commands.name: mmemory_catalog_data_arbitrary
commands.description: Query the arbitrary waveform data files in the specified directory.

commands.name: mmemory_catalog_state
commands.description: Query the state files in the specified directory.

commands.name: mmemory_cdirectory
commands.description: Set or query the current working directory.

commands.name: mmemory_copy
commands.description: Copy a file into the specified directory.

commands.name: mmemory_delete
commands.description: Delete the specified file.

commands.name: mmemory_load_all
commands.description: Load the specified state file (full instrument state).

commands.name: mmemory_load_data
commands.description: Load the specified arbitrary waveform data file into the channel.

commands.name: mmemory_load_state
commands.description: Load the specified state file.

commands.name: mmemory_mdirectory
commands.description: Create a new directory.

commands.name: mmemory_rdirectory
commands.description: Remove the specified directory, or query the current directory.

commands.name: mmemory_store_all
commands.description: Store the current instrument state to the specified file.

commands.name: mmemory_store_data
commands.description: Store the channel arbitrary waveform data to the specified file.

commands.name: mmemory_store_state
commands.description: Store the current instrument state to the specified state file.

commands.name: pa_state
commands.description: Enable or disable, or query, the power amplifier (DG1000Z-P option).

commands.name: pa_gain
commands.description: Set or query the power amplifier gain.

commands.name: pa_offset_state
commands.description: Enable or disable, or query, the power amplifier DC offset.

commands.name: pa_offset_value
commands.description: Set or query the power amplifier DC offset value.

commands.name: pa_output_polarity
commands.description: Set or query the power amplifier output polarity.

commands.name: pa_save
commands.description: Save the current power amplifier settings.

commands.name: roscillator_source
commands.description: Set or query the reference oscillator (clock) source.

commands.name: roscillator_source_current
commands.description: Query the reference clock source currently in use.

commands.name: system_beeper
commands.description: Generate a beep immediately.

commands.name: system_beeper_state
commands.description: Enable or disable, or query, the beeper.

commands.name: system_channel_current
commands.description: Set or query the current channel.

commands.name: system_channel_number
commands.description: Query the number of channels of the instrument.

commands.name: system_gpib_address
commands.description: Set or query the GPIB address.

commands.name: system_lan_apply
commands.description: Apply the current LAN configuration.

commands.name: system_lan_autoip
commands.description: Enable or disable, or query, the auto IP configuration mode.

commands.name: system_lan_control
commands.description: Query the initial socket control connection port number.

commands.name: system_lan_dhcp
commands.description: Enable or disable, or query, the DHCP configuration mode.

commands.name: system_lan_dns
commands.description: Set or query the DNS server address.

commands.name: system_lan_domain
commands.description: Set or query the LAN domain name.

commands.name: system_lan_gateway
commands.description: Set or query the default gateway address.

commands.name: system_lan_hostname
commands.description: Set or query the host name.

commands.name: system_lan_ipaddress
commands.description: Set or query the IP address.

commands.name: system_lan_mac
commands.description: Query the MAC address.

commands.name: system_lan_smask
commands.description: Set or query the subnet mask.

commands.name: system_lan_static
commands.description: Enable or disable, or query, the static IP configuration mode.

commands.name: system_lan_update
commands.description: Update and apply the LAN configuration.

commands.name: system_usb_information
commands.description: Query the USB interface information.

commands.name: system_usb_class
commands.description: Set or query the USB device class (computer or printer).

commands.name: system_cscopy
commands.description: Copy the settings of one channel to the other channel.

commands.name: system_error
commands.description: Query and clear the oldest error in the error queue.

commands.name: system_klock
commands.description: Lock or unlock, or query, the front panel keys.

commands.name: system_language
commands.description: Set or query the system language.

commands.name: system_poweron
commands.description: Set or query the power-on configuration (default or last).

commands.name: system_preset
commands.description: Restore the instrument to a preset state.

commands.name: system_roscillator_source
commands.description: Set or query the system reference oscillator source.

commands.name: system_security_immediate
commands.description: Clear all user data and restore factory defaults immediately.

commands.name: system_version
commands.description: Query the SCPI version number the instrument complies with.

commands.name: trigger_immediate
commands.description: Generate an immediate trigger for the specified channel (sweep/burst).

commands.name: trigger_delay
commands.description: Set or query the trigger delay of the specified channel.

commands.name: trigger_slope
commands.description: Set or query the edge of the external trigger signal.

commands.name: trigger_source
commands.description: Set or query the trigger source of the specified channel.
